upasargachandrika.example_text: piwakAyAH pAkaH prapAko Bavati
'nizpakvaM kvaTitam' (amaraH)
'tasminsarpirvipaceyuH' (kA0 SrO0 24312) vipaceyuH SrapayeyuH saMSInaM drAvayeyuH
'garBaSAlisaDarmARastasya gUQaM vipecire' (samAramBAH) (raGu0 1753) PalitA ityarTaH
'dahyamAnA vipacyante na tatrAsti palAyanam' (BA0 anu0 13022) vipacyante Bfjjyante
'BuktaM BuktamidaM kozWe kaTamannaM vipacyate' (BA0 anu0 1939) vipacyate jIryati
'nakzatrapIqA bahuDA yaTAkAlAd vipacyate' (suSruta0 11032) vipacyate vipAkavatI Bavati PalaM prasUte
'BAryayA hi kftaM karma patyAvapi vipacyate' (bf0 Slo0 saM0 2737) vipacyate Palati
'lohayuktaM yaTA hema vipakvaM na virAjate' (BA0 SAM0 2126) vipakvaM pAkahInam virviroDe
'amI pfTustambaBftaH piSaNgatAM gatA vipAkena Palasya SAlayaH' (ki0 426) vipAkaH pAkaH pariRAmaH
'vAcAM vipAko mama' (BAminI0 442) ukto'rTaH
'sati mUle tadvipAko jAtyAyurBogAH' (yo0 sU0 213) vizAkaH Palam
'sarvARi pUrvakarmARi hyante janmani vipacyante' (nyABA0 4164) vipacyante pariRamante Palanti PalAni prasuvate
'utpacavipacA' (mayUravyaMsakAdayaSca 2172 ityatra vfttO)
'kzIraM sTAlIgatamaBipacyamAnam' (suSruta0 114911) aBipacyamAnaM SrapyamARam SrIyamARam SrIYaH karmaRi SAnaci rUpam
'analenABiprapacyamAnAnAM mahABUtAnAM saNGAto GanaH saMjAyate' (suSruta0 13226) spazwo'rTaH
'SaradamozaDayo'Bi saMpacyante' (paYca0 brA0 21143) samaM paktrimA BavantItyAha
'pUrvajanmakftaM karma kAlena paripacyate' (hari0 23235) paripacyate Palati PalaM prasUyate
'paripAkapiSaNgalatArajasA roDaScakAsti kapiSaM galatA' (SiSu0 448) kArtsnyena pAkaH paripAkaH
'prapannAnAM mUrttaH sukftaparipAko janimatAm' (mahAvIra0 431) paripAko vipAkaH Palam
'vIkzya tasya vinaye paripAkaM pAkaSAsanapadaM spfSatopi' (nE0 520) paripAkaH paryAptiH prakarzaparyantaH
